summary: Mixed‑quality tape of the 9/6/85 second set – decent show highlights like Black Peter and a nice Space, but recording clarity is only average.
review: Reviewers note that the second set provides good driving music with a standout Black Peter where Jerry tells a story and delivers great outro licks, plus an enjoyable Space. No concrete details about the source are given, and listeners with hearing issues find it only marginally audible, suggesting an average‑quality recording.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic five‑star comments but no technical detail, and two three‑star reviews that provide modest praise of the performance while hinting at average audio quality. The weighted blend yields a mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on soundboard vs audience; listeners with tinnitus report difficulty hearing, implying the tape is not exceptionally clear.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second‑set tape described as good driving music with a nice, atmospheric Space segment; overall flow judged solid but not extraordinary.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Described as telling a story on Black Peter and delivering amazing outro licks.
